contentType.label: Content Type
contentType.locked: Content type is locked after uploading media

suggestion.title: Content Type Suggestion
suggestion.reason: Based on the media you added, we suggest a different content type.

poll.title: Poll Options
poll.note: Polls are only supported on Twitter and Facebook. Make sure to select compatible platforms.

media.backgroundUpload: Saved! Media is uploading in the background.
media.lockFailed: Warning: Could not lock media for editing

errors.svgNotAllowed: SVG files are not supported by social media platforms

upload.uploadingInBackground: {{count}} file(s) are uploading in the background. They will be linked automatically when complete.
upload.uploadingBackground: Uploading files in background — you can save without waiting

schedule.instantWarning: To publish now, use the Publish button after saving.

recurrence.title: Repeat publication (Recurrence)
recurrence.locked_desc: Upgrade your plan to schedule automatic repetitions (every X days/weeks) for your publications.
recurrence.end_date_required: End date is required for recurring publications
recurrence.preview_note: These dates are estimated and will be reflected in the calendar when saved.
recurrence.select_accounts_desc: Select which networks will publish recurrently. The others will only publish once.
recurrence.single_account_note: This network will publish recurrently according to the configuration.

edit.previewShowHint: See how your post will look
edit.contentLockedHint: To edit the content (title, description or files), you must unpublish the post from all platforms.
edit.contentPublishingHint: The publication is being published to some platforms. You must wait for the process to finish before you can edit the content.
edit.approvedEditWarningHint: This publication has already been approved. If you make changes, it will return to 'Pending' status and require a new approval.
edit.pendingReviewWarningHint: This publication is awaiting approval. You cannot edit it until it is approved or rejected.

locking.usersWaiting: There are {{count}} user(s) waiting for you to finish.

comments.noComments: No comments yet. Start the conversation!
comments.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? This action cannot be undone.

publish.title: Publish
publish.noCompatibleAccounts: No accounts compatible with this content type.
publish.changeContentType: Change the content type or connect compatible accounts.
publish.oauth1_video_message: This account needs OAuth 1.0a credentials to upload videos

unpublish.title: Unpublish from {{platform}}?
unpublish.message: Are you sure you want to unpublish this content from {{platform}}? This action cannot be undone.

pendingReviewBanner.title: Publication Under Review
pendingReviewBanner.message: This publication has already been sent for review. An administrator must approve it before it can be published.

rejectedBanner.title: Publication Rejected
rejectedBanner.message: This publication has been rejected by {{name}}.
rejectedBanner.footer: Make the necessary adjustments and resubmit for review.

alreadyPublishedBanner.title: Active Publication
alreadyPublishedBanner.message: This publication is already published on the following accounts:
alreadyPublishedBanner.hint: You can publish to additional accounts by selecting them below.

incompatibleAccountsBanner.title: Incompatible Accounts
incompatibleAccountsBanner.hint: These accounts will not appear in the publishing options.

publishingBanner.title: Publishing in progress…
publishingBanner.message: Your content is being published to the selected platforms.

preview.disclaimer: Preview is an approximation. Actual appearance may vary by platform.

validation.descMin: Description must be at least 10 characters long
validation.objMin: Objective must be at least 5 characters long
validation.titleLength: Title must be at least 70 characters long
validation.nameLength: Name must be at least 10 characters
validation.descriptionLength: Description must be at least 10 characters long
validation.hashtagsLength: Hashtags must be at least 10 characters long
validation.schedulePublicationLength: Schedule Publication must be at least 10 characters long
validation.hashtagMax: Hashtag must be at least 10 characters long
validation.scheduleDateRequired: Select a date to schedule on the selected networks or uncheck the schedule option
validation.scheduleRequired: You must schedule a date for all selected networks or set a global date.
validation.scheduledAtRequired: Scheduled date is required when you select social networks
validation.socialAccountsRequired: Select at least one social media account
validation.allSchedulesRequired: All networks must have a date or enable the global date
validation.singleVideo: You can only upload one video per publication.
validation.scheduledMinDifference: The date must be at least 1 minute after the current time
validation.recurrenceDaysRequired: Select at least one day for weekly recurrence
validation.durationErrors: Fix the duration errors before saving.
validation.pollDurationRequired: Poll duration must be between 1 and 168 hours
validation.content_type_not_supported: Content type ':type' is not supported by :platforms. Select compatible platforms or change the content type.
validation.reel_requires_video_only: Reels require video files only (no images)
validation.carousel_requires_multiple: Carousels require at least 2 media files (maximum 10)
validation.story_requires_one: Stories require exactly 1 media file (image or video)
validation.poll_not_supported: Polls are only supported on Twitter
validation.cross_platform_incompatibility: The selected content type is not supported by all selected platforms
validation.invalid_media_type: Invalid media type for the selected content type
validation.media_required: Media files are required for this content type
validation.media_min_count: At least :min media files are required

cancel_confirmation.title: Cancel Publication
cancel_confirmation.message: Are you sure you want to cancel this publication? Social media broadcasting will stop.

cancel_platform.title: Cancel {{platform}}?
cancel_platform.message: Are you sure you want to cancel publishing on {{platform}}? All retries for this platform will stop.

cancelAllConfirm.title: Cancel ALL platforms?
cancelAllConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to cancel publishing on ALL platforms ({{count}})? All retries will stop. Platforms that have already been published will not be affected.

live.title: Live Stream Settings
live.note: The scheduled time is when your live stream will start.

emptyState.title: No publications found
emptyState.description: Create a publication to start publishing content.
emptyState.searchEmpty: No publications found matching the search.

messages.mediaAttached: Media file attached successfully to '{{title}}' (Background Upload)
messages.publishNowFailed: The publication was saved but could not be published. Open it and publish manually.
messages.publishAfterUpload: Saved. Files are still uploading: publish it once the upload finishes.

validation.carousel_requires_multiple: A carousel requires multiple media files
validation.content_type_not_supported: The :type content type is not supported by: :platforms
validation.media_required: At least one media file is required
validation.no_images_allowed: This content type does not allow images
validation.no_videos_allowed: This content type does not allow videos
validation.reel_requires_one_video: A reel requires exactly one video
validation.story_requires_one: A story requires exactly one media file
validation.videoTooLong: The video exceeds the maximum duration for {{platform}} ({{max}})

quickComposer.title: Quick post
quickComposer.placeholder: What do you want to publish today?
quickComposer.accountsRequired: Select at least one account to publish
